title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Gareth Llewellyn
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr Gareth Llewellyn  Teacher reference number: 0301868  Teacher’s date of birth: 18 February 1971  Location teacher worked: Coventry, West Midlands  Date of professional conduct panel: 22 September to 29 September 2025  Outcome type: Prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr Gareth Llewellyn formerly employed in Coventry, West Midlands.   Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
